description_long: This object consists of two shotguns with wooden stocks and dark metal barrels, accompanied by a set of large, pointed ammunition rounds. The shotguns feature full-length stocks with a smooth, contoured wood grain and a robust, metallic receiver and barrel assembly. The barrels are long and cylindrical, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the action mechanism appears to be a break-action design, as indicated by the hinge and open position in some views. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger area. The ammunition is grouped together and appears to be designed for use with these shotguns, with pointed tips and metallic casings. The overall appearance suggests a classic, utilitarian design suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A pair of classic break-action shotguns with wooden stocks and dark metal barrels, accompanied by pointed ammunition rounds. The design is robust and utilitarian, with smooth wood and metallic finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle ends of both shotguns and a clear display of the pointed ammunition rounds arranged upright.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden stocks, the break-action hinge, and the alignment of the barrels and ammunition.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the contoured wooden stocks and the open breech area of the shotguns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the barrels, stocks, and a clear arrangement of the ammunition rounds in front of the shotguns.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
